rules.description: IP agreements must clearly specify ownership or assignment of intellectual property rights.
rules.statutory_reference: Copyright Act 1957 – S.17; Patents Act 1970 – S.68

rules.description: IP agreements must define the scope of IP rights granted or assigned.
Software development agreements should include warranty provisions for defect liability.
rules.statutory_reference: Information Technology Act 2000; Indian Contract Act 1872 – S.73

rules.description: IP licensing agreements must specify restrictions on use to prevent misuse of licensed rights.
rules.statutory_reference: Copyright Act 1957 – S.30; Patents Act 1970 – S.84
